summary: W1305 proves W730 boundary/relation unpacking does not close the original four-task contract: W730 opens to W716 plus W717, and W730/W716/W717 routes expand to three, twenty-two, and twenty-one inputs, all larger than the remaining W1270 one-input W987 surface.
